description_long: This is a cylindrical metal can of Campbell's Condensed Chicken Noodle Soup, featuring the iconic red and white color scheme. The front displays the Campbell's script logo in white on a red background, with a gold medallion and the product name 'Chicken Noodle Soup' in bold black and gold letters. The can's sides include detailed product information, such as the 'Made in Canada' label, fluid ounce size, and preparation instructions in both English and French. Additional text lists other soup varieties and ingredients, with gold and red seals indicating approval and authenticity. The top of the can is metallic silver with concentric ring patterns, typical of sealed canned goods.
description: A cylindrical Campbell's Chicken Noodle Soup can with a red and white label, gold medallion, and detailed product information.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Campbell's logo, gold medallion, and 'Chicken Noodle Soup' text prominently.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the 'Made in Canada' label, gold seals, and bilingual preparation instructions.
description_view_2: This view displays a list of soup varieties, a gold approval seal, and more product details.
description_view_3: This angle shows the continuation of the soup varieties list and the upper portion of the Campbell's logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, white, cursive 'Campbell's' logo is visible on the red upper half of the can, occupying the front and partially wrapping around the sides.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'Chicken Noodle' in gold and black on the front clearly indicates the flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Preparation instructions and some product details are visible on the back and side, but no full nutritional facts panel is clearly shown.
